name: Bocce Ball Jiggle Shots
recipeIngredient: 2 small boxe (or one large) orange jell-o
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Jello, boiling water and Amaretto and let cool.
2. Pour into 2-ounce cups or a large pan and chill.
3. If in a large pan, cut into two ounce or smaller servings before serving.
Here are the shooters that Vickey sent Nancy Pallota (on the Country e-mail list). Vickey asks you to beware of the strength of these goodies and to consume them cautiously.
